controls.name: Transactional outbox closes the post-commit dispatch gap
requiredEvidence: transactional producers enqueue durable outbox rows

controls.name: Client correlation is separated from trusted server identity
requiredEvidence: validated clientTraceId kept only as correlation
HMAC-authenticated internal identity and tenant policy

controls.name: Tenant policy is explicit across business, cache, vector, event and audit boundaries
requiredEvidence: outbox and vectors carry the fixed tenant

controls.name: Test success and production readiness are independently gated
requiredEvidence: NO_GO while production evidence is incomplete
